data.title: Cooling tower market projected to surpass USD 5 billion by 2031, with CAGR of 5.09% fueled by power generation & data centers.
data.description: In Hyderabad, India, as of February 12, 2026, market research firm Mordor Intelligence has projected significant growth in the cooling tower industry. The market size is anticipated to increase from USD 4.59 billion in 2026 to approximately USD 5.89 billion by 2031, with a compound annual growth rate (CAGR) of 5.09%. This growth trajectory is attributed to new investments in the power sector and other industries, driving demand for cooling tower systems.
OFFICIALS CLAIM DRONE INCURSION LED TO SHUTDOWN OF EL PASO AIRPORT – NY TIMES

data.title: Planet 13 Holdings Inc. completes exit from California markets, selling licenses and property, streamlining operations.
data.description: Planet 13 Holdings Inc., a prominent multi-state cannabis company, has recently finalized the divestiture of its retail and distribution licenses in Orange County, California. Additionally, the sale of its Coalinga, California cultivation facility property has been completed, with the transfer of the cultivation license to the buyer currently underway. This signifies the Company's significant progress in exiting the California market as part of their strategic plans. The company's successful actions have included the sale of property associated with the cultivation facility and the completion of divestiture of licenses in Orange County, California.

data.title: Global drug abuse testing market to reach $8.9 billion by 2033, growing at 6% CAGR, driven by increasing incidence and regulations.
data.description: There has been a notable increase in the prevalence of drug abuse worldwide, highlighting the necessity for drug abuse testing. This trend is supported by a surge in governmental mandates for drug abuse screenings in sectors like sports, workplaces, and beyond. As a result, the market for drug abuse testing is experiencing substantial growth. This phenomenon is particularly evident in regions like PORTLAND.

data.title: Global auto repair and maintenance market set to reach USD 2.07 trillion by 2035, driven by growth in vehicle parc and complexity.
data.description: In Newark, Delaware, a report predicts substantial growth in the global automotive repair & maintenance services market from 2025 to 2035. This growth is attributed to factors such as the expanding global vehicle parc, the higher complexity of vehicles, and the increased emphasis from consumers and fleet owners on ensuring the longevity of their vehicles. This growth trend signals a significant opportunity for the automotive industry, with projections indicating a steady rise in demand and investment in this sector over the next decade.
SENATE COMMERCE COMMITTEE APPROVES BILL TO SPEED APPROVALS OF NEW SATELLITE LAUNCHES

data.title: Norwegian sovereign wealth fund's US equity portfolio: 1,577 stocks, 30% ($280B) invested in 7 companies like Nvidia, Apple, Microsoft, Amazon.
data.description: Norges Bank Investment Management's recent 13F filing, showcasing the U.S. equity holdings of the Government Pension Fund Global, sheds light on the market landscape in 2025. Despite holding 1,577 U.S. stocks, a significant portion of approximately $280 billion from their $935 billion U.S. equity portfolio is heavily concentrated in just seven companies. Termed the 'Magnificent 7', these companies—including Nvidia Corp, Apple Inc, and Microsoft Corp—are not only dominating the market but essentially embody it. This information reveals a lack of diversification within the fund, with a substantial portion of its assets tied to a handful of key players, emphasizing the importance of these select few in the current market environment.

data.title: Sunbit appoints Shachar G. Scott as CMO to fuel growth phase; aims for more personalized financial solutions.
data.description: Sunbit in Los Angeles recently appointed Shachar G. Scott as their new Chief Marketing Officer. As a personalized financial partner, Sunbit aims to support individuals in their daily lives.

data.title: Stallion Uranium starts Phase 1 drilling on Moonlite Project in Athabasca Basin. Covers 100% owned mineral claims and partnership with Atha Energy Corp.
data.description: Stallion Uranium Corp. has started its 2026 winter diamond drilling program at the Moonlite Project in the Athabasca Basin of northern Saskatchewan. The program will focus on the Coyote Corridor, a significant structural zone pinpointed through extensive geophysical surveys and geological modeling done in collaboration with Atha Energy Corp. The Moonlite Project includes mineral claims wholly owned by Stallion as well as claims under option with Atha Energy Corp. Stallion Uranium Corp. is listed on TSX-V as STUD, OTCQB as STLNF, and FSE as B76. The company is excited to begin this drilling venture after diligent planning and partnership with Atha Energy, listed on TSX-V as SASK.

data.title: Contango ORE, Inc. to hold webinar on Feb 12, 2026 at 12pm PST/3pm EST to discuss recent financing.
data.description: In Fairbanks, Alaska, on February 12, 2026, Contango ORE, Inc. (NYSE American: CTGO) is set to conduct a conference call and webcast starting at 12:00 pm Pacific Time / 3:00 pm Eastern Time. The purpose of this event is to delve into the recently secured financing, discussing the proceeds generated.

data.title: Dow up after jobless claims surprise; AppLovin, Cisco stocks plunge on earnings. Market updates on Investor's Business Daily.
data.description: The Dow Jones index experienced an increase on Thursday due to unexpected jobless claims, while AppLovin and Cisco saw a decline in their earnings. The stock market today showed a rise in the Dow Jones index after a surprising turn in jobless claims. However, AppLovin and Cisco faced a dive in their earnings. Live coverage of these events has been provided without specifying the source of information.

data.title: Annuities from Precise Financial Solutions in Port Charlotte ensure safe growth of assets, steady income for retirement.
data.description: Precise Financial Solutions is emphasizing the reliability and security of annuities as a means to cultivate wealth for individuals, especially those close to retirement age. The company's recent discussion in PORT CHARLOTTE, Fla., on Feb. 12, 2026, highlighted how annuities offer a stable income and safeguarded funds in the face of market fluctuations. As people seek financial stability, annuities serve as a dependable option for growing wealth, ensuring a steady source of income in uncertain times.

data.title: Real estate expert Laurie Bouwman from Interlochen, MI, highlights the importance of pre-approval for a smooth home buying process.
data.description: In Interlochen, Michigan on February 12, 2026, a recent HelloNation article highlights a crucial tip for buyers in the current housing market. Transitioning from browsing to buying with assurance is aided by obtaining pre-approval prior to house hunting. This proactive step significantly boosts buyer confidence when making their purchase decisions.

data.title: ZS2 increases US manufacturing capacity for construction projects, strengthening material availability.
data.description: Expansion of strategic manufacturing is enhancing material accessibility for high-performance construction projects throughout the U.S. ZS2 is extending its manufacturing presence in North America to the United States. The move, announced on Feb. 12, 2026, involves establishing operations in Mobile, Alabama, in addition to their existing base in Calgary, Alberta. This expansion is aimed at increasing capacity to meet the growing demand for materials, with a focus on supporting innovative construction initiatives. The decision to expand the manufacturing footprint signifies a significant investment by ZS2, which is set to create jobs and contribute to the economy in both locations.

data.title: Fastly stock soars after beating Q4 earnings with revenue topped estimates, thanks to AI boosting network traffic.
data.description: Shares of Fastly experienced a significant surge as the company reported impressive fourth-quarter earnings and revenue that surpassed expectations. The boost was driven by artificial intelligence applications, which led to increased network traffic. The company surpassed analysts' estimates, benefitting from larger customer deals. The positive financial results further propelled Fastly's stock, reflecting the success and growth of the business.

data.title: Sanofi's stock falls as board removes CEO Paul Hudson, replaces him with Belen Garijo from Merck KGaA.
data.description: The stock of Sanofi experienced a significant decline on Thursday following the removal of CEO Paul Hudson by the company's board. Hudson was replaced by Belen Garijo from Merck KGaA. This unexpected change caused a tumble in Sanofi's stock price.

data.title: Icon stock plunges after internal accounting probe, jeopardizing 2025 earnings. - Investor's Business Daily.
data.description: The value of Icon stock on Thursday experienced a sharp decline following the announcement by the clinical research organization of an internal probe into its accounting procedures. The investigation has raised concerns about the company's earnings projections for 2025. This development was reported on Investor's Business Daily website.

data.title: Howmet Aerospace and Curtiss-Wright's earnings cause stocks to surge. Hexcel hits record high on upgrade.
data.description: Howmet Aerospace and Curtiss-Wright experience a rise in stock prices due to positive quarterly results and outlooks. Hexcel also sees a surge to a potential record high following an upgrade. The strong earnings and optimistic forecasts contribute to a bullish defense sector, leading to increased investor interest.

data.title: Cisco's profit margin outlook affects Dell, HPE, Arista, Celestica shares, declines due to higher memory chip prices.
data.description: The stock of Cisco, along with competitors such as Dell, Arista, and HPE, experienced a decline as a result of Cisco's statement regarding the impact of increased memory chip prices on profit margins. This announcement led to a drop in shares of Dell, HPE, Arista, and Celestica. The overall outlook on profit margins contributed to this downward trend in the stock market.

data.title: Veterinary Ophthalmology Equipment Market to reach $0.83 billion by 2031, growing from $0.54 billion in 2026 at 7.7% CAGR.
data.description: A research report reveals that the Veterinary Ophthalmology Equipment Market based in DELRAY BEACH, Fla., is estimated to increase from approximately USD 0.54 billion in 2026 to USD 0.83 billion by 2031, showcasing a Compound Annual Growth Rate (CAGR) of 7.7%. The market data includes 400 tables and 65 figures for thorough analysis and understanding of the sector.
